quotes.Quote: "Everyone who is serious about software should make their own hardware."
quotes.Author: Alan Kay

quotes.Quote: What I cannot create, I do not understand.
quotes.Author: Richard Feynman

quotes.Quote: Good design is as little design as possible.
quotes.Author: Dieter Rams

quotes.Quote: Make something people want.
quotes.Author: Paul Graham

quotes.Quote: the right thing for the right reason at the right time with the right people.
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
quotes.Author: Fredrick Nietzsche

quotes.Quote: "I have offended God and Mankind, by doing so little with my life."
quotes.Author: Leonardo Da Vinci, on his deathbed

quotes.Quote: why do you do what you do, what's your purpose?
quotes.Author: Kid at Minecon 2013

quotes.Quote: Works on my machine.​
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: "The code is the documentation."
quotes.Author: Martin Fowler

quotes.Quote: The greatest muscle you can build is urgency. Decrease the time between having an idea and getting it done. Everything changes.
quotes.Author: Codie Sanchez

quotes.Quote: "we do this not because it is easy, but because we thought it would be easy."
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
quotes.Author: James Clear

quotes.Quote: "A man who procrastinates in his choosing will inevitably have his choice made for him by circumstance."
quotes.Author: Hunter S. Thompson

quotes.Quote: "There is no cloud, it's just someone else's computer."
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: "Every block of stone has a statue inside it and it is the task of the sculptor to discover it."
quotes.Author: Michelangelo

quotes.Quote: 'Amateur' comes from the Latin word 'amare', which means to love—to do things for the love of it.
quotes.Author: Mozart in the Jungle

quotes.Quote: "A good plan violently executed now is better than a perfect plan executed next week."
quotes.Author: George Patton

quotes.Quote: A complex system that works is invariably found to have evolved from a simple system that worked.
quotes.Author: John Gall

quotes.Quote: As you become an adult, you realize that things around you weren't just always there; people made them happen. But only recently have started to internalize how much tenacity everything requires. That hotel, that park, that railway. **The world is a museum of passion projects.**
quotes.Author: Jacob Collison

quotes.Quote: my competitive advantage is that I'm having fun.
quotes.Author: Logan Kilpatrick

quotes.Quote: Real artists ship.
quotes.Author: Steve Jobs

quotes.Quote: "If someone watched you for a week, would they believe you're serious about your goals? Would they see discipline, effort, and consistency? Or would they see distractions, procrastination, wasted time? You don't have to tell people what you want. How you spend your days already does."
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: "Done is better than perfect."
quotes.Author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.Quote: "If you define the problem correctly, you almost have the solution."
quotes.Author: Steve Jobs

quotes.Quote: Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
quotes.Author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.Quote: "Just do it."
quotes.Author: Shia LaBeouf

quotes.Quote: In most people’s vocabularies, design means veneer. But to me, nothing could be further from the meaning of design. Design is the fundamental soul of a man-made creation that ends up expressing itself in successive outer layers.
quotes.Author: Steve Jobs

quotes.Quote: Focus is a matter of deciding what things you're not going to do.
quotes.Author: John Carmack

quotes.Quote: Keep it simple, stupid.
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: the only restriction is your imagination
quotes.Author: Laurie Spiegel

quotes.Quote: perfectionism is just procrastination with better branding.
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: Civilization advances by extending the number of important operations which we can perform without thinking of them.
quotes.Author: Alfred North Whitehead

quotes.Quote: you can just do things.
quotes.Author: Unknown

quotes.Quote: "Premature optimization is the root of all evil."
quotes.Author: Donald Knuth

quotes.Quote: Most of the things I am most proud of have come from just doing the thing.
quotes.Author: Logan Kilpatrick

quotes.Quote: Simplicity is the prerequisite for reliability.
quotes.Author: Edsger W. Dijkstra

quotes.Quote: The only way to discover the limits of the possible is to go beyond them into the impossible.
quotes.Author: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.Quote: "Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication."
quotes.Author: Unknown
